Home › About Us

About Us

Leading the Future of Healthcare in Oman and Beyond

Our Story

A Vision Built on
Trust & Care

Established in 2024, AL-AROUBA PHARMACY was founded with a clear vision — to become one of the most trusted names in pharmaceutical retail and wholesale across the Sultanate of Oman.

In a remarkably short period, we have successfully expanded to three strategic branches located in Salalah and other key locations, reflecting our commitment to accessible, reliable, and high-quality healthcare services.

Our ambition continues to grow beyond local boundaries as we work toward expanding our healthcare expertise and distribution network throughout the GCC region.

AL-AROUBA at a Glance

📅
2024
Year Founded
🏪
3
Branches in Salalah
Oman
Sultanate of Oman
🌍
GCC
Expanding Region
🎯

Our Mission

To deliver trusted healthcare solutions through professional service, quality products, and a customer-focused approach. We strive to bridge global pharmaceutical innovation with the healthcare needs of the local community.

Healing Hands, Caring Hearts

Because Your Health Matters

WHAT WE CARRY

Comprehensive Healthcare
Product Portfolio

Every product in our portfolio meets stringent international standards — giving healthcare professionals and patients confidence in every item we supply.

💊

Pharmaceuticals

Prescription and over-the-counter medications sourced from WHO-GMP certified manufacturers. Covering acute, chronic, and specialty therapeutic areas.

Antibiotics Cardiology Diabetes Care Pain Relief Oncology
🩺

Medical Devices & Equipment

CE-marked and FDA-registered diagnostic tools, monitoring devices, and clinical instruments for hospitals, clinics, and home care.

Diagnostics Monitoring Surgical Tools Rehabilitation
🧴

Cosmetics & Dermatology

Medically formulated skincare, dermocosmetics, and personal care products trusted by dermatologists and beauty professionals.

Skincare Sunscreen Anti-Aging Wound Care
🌿

Vitamins & Supplements

High-bioavailability vitamins, minerals, and nutraceuticals to support immunity, energy, bone health, and overall wellness.

Multivitamins Omega-3 Probiotics Immunity
🩹

Medical Consumables

Sterile disposables, wound-care supplies, and clinical consumables that meet hospital-grade infection-control standards.

Gloves Syringes Bandages IV Supplies
👶

Baby & Mother Care

Gentle, clinically tested products for newborns, infants, and mothers — from pediatric nutrition to postnatal wellness solutions.

Infant Formula Baby Skincare Postnatal Pediatrics
FEATURED LINES

Product Spotlight

💊
Pharmaceutical Line
CORE PHARMACEUTICAL RANGE

Trusted Medications
for Every Need

Our pharmaceutical portfolio spans over 300 molecules across therapeutic categories — from essential antibiotics and cardiovascular agents to specialty oncology and neurology products, all sourced from certified global manufacturers.

  • ✓ WHO-GMP certified manufacturing partners
  • ✓ Cold chain logistics for temperature-sensitive drugs
  • ✓ Full regulatory documentation & batch traceability
  • ✓ Available in original & generic formulations
🩺
Medical Device Line
MEDICAL DEVICES & DIAGNOSTICS

Precision Instruments
You Can Rely On

From point-of-care diagnostics to advanced monitoring systems, our medical device range equips healthcare facilities with cutting-edge tools that improve patient outcomes and clinical efficiency.

  • ✓ CE-marked & FDA-registered devices
  • ✓ After-sales support & calibration services
  • ✓ Training provided for clinical teams
  • ✓ Compatible with GCC regulatory requirements
OUR COMMITMENT

Quality You Can Trust

Every product we distribute undergoes rigorous quality verification, regulatory review, and proper storage protocols — because your health is our highest priority.

🏅WHO-GMP Certified
❄️Cold Chain Secured
📋Fully Documented
🔬Lab Verified
